name: sanjaya  kandel
subject: ai management
message: AI management involves the strategic planning, development, deployment, and monitoring of artificial intelligence systems to improve efficiency, decision-making, and innovation within organizations. It combines technology, data management, automation, and human oversight to ensure AI tools operate effectively, ethically, and securely. Effective AI management includes handling machine learning models, maintaining data quality, monitoring system performance, reducing bias, protecting user privacy, and aligning AI solutions with business goals. As industries increasingly adopt AI-driven technologies, strong AI management helps organizations streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and stay competitive in the digital era.
